prestazioni: Engine swap to a **SR20DET Red Top (Version 3, 205hp stock)** with a **Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger** (0.86 A/R, 60 trim) paired with a **Tomei 260° camshaft set** (intake/exhaust) and **JUN 1.5mm head gasket** for 1.2mm total deck height to prevent detonation at 1.5 bar boost.

Full **HKS Hi-Power 2.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system** with **custom 3-inch downpipe** (fabricated to clear the Avenir’s subframe) and **GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller** for precise 22 psi peak pressure mapping via **Haltech Elite 1500 ECU** (with Nissan SR20DET Avenir-specific harness and **ID1000 injectors**).

Suspension overhaul with **Tein Flex Z coilovers (Avenir W10 chassis-specific valving)** paired with **Cusco 22mm front sway bar (PN: 666 540 A)** and **Nismo R34 GT-R rear sway bar (modified to fit W10 subframe)**. Braking upgraded to **Endless CC-R6 rotors (280mm front, 260mm rear)** with **Project Mu 999 pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop braided lines**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Avenir Salut-specific widebody kit** (fiberglass fenders, custom front bumper with **Seibon carbon hood** and **Voltex Type-3 rear wing** on **C-West mounts**).

**Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (17x9 +30 front, 17x10 +35 rear)** with **Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires (235/40/17 front, 265/35/17 rear)** and **NRG Innovations quick-release hubs** for track use.

**Full interior strip** (retaining rear seats for legality) with **Bride Zeta III bucket seats (SR20DET-specific mounts)**, **Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses**, **Defi BF Advance gauges (oil temp, boost, wideband AFR)** in a **custom A-pillar pod**, and **Momo Prototipo steering wheel** on a **NRG quick-release hub**.
